visual_description: A person in dark clothing stands in a dimly lit room, their silhouette visible against a faint light source. They are holding a long, thin object, possibly a weapon, in their right hand. The person is looking at their reflection in a large, ornate mirror on the wall.
audio_description: A low, sustained, and ominous musical tone plays in the background, creating a suspenseful atmosphere.
